actor_status.description: A controlled grey-goo payload is dismantling this unit from the inside out. It reproduces just enough to keep destroying tissue and machinery at the rate dictated by its stack count.
actor_status.strategy_tip_optional: Stacks. Deals health damage each turn based on intensity. Each turn has a 35% chance to shed 1 stack as hostile conditions break replication balance. When a target dies, half the payload spreads to nearby enemies and combines with any existing Grey Goo stacks.
